project.name: Build, Plant, Grow
project.description: Hands-on workplace readiness project where students build planters, grow plants, and connect tasks to real work skills. Math, planning, and communication tasks are grounded in the project.

notes: K designation students. All tasks should connect to the active BPG project phase. Concrete, visual, and short — no abstract or decontextualized tasks. Project context is the hook.
